nodes.name: Tokyo
nodes.description: Capital of Japan since 1868. Population ~14 million (city proper).

nodes.name: Emperor Meiji
nodes.description: Japanese emperor who moved the capital from Kyoto to Tokyo in 1868.

nodes.name: Photosynthesis
nodes.description: Biological process converting light energy to glucose using CO2 and H2O.

nodes.name: Chloroplast
nodes.description: Plant cell organelle containing chlorophyll that conducts photosynthesis.

nodes.name: Colosseum
nodes.description: Oval amphitheatre in Rome. UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1980.

nodes.name: Venice
nodes.description: Italian city built on islands. UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1987.

nodes.name: Florence
nodes.description: Italian city. Historic Centre is a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1982.
